api_errors.store_closed_for_channel: The store is currently closed for this order type.

api_errors.desired_time_in_past: The desired time must be in the future.

api_errors.desired_time_too_soon: The desired time must be at least {{minutes}} minutes from now.
api_errors.product_not_for_delivery: This product is not available for delivery.
